progress_summary: Pre-commit gate run for the v1.2 feature batch (12 SKILL.md updates, 3 new walkthrough scenarios, /changelog page, homepage v1.2 pill, footer link, styleguide bump, .opchain/pm.yaml schema, getSkillUpdatedAt REPO_ROOT walk-up bug fix). astro check 0/0 errors+warnings; vitest 108/108 pass; anti-pattern grep clean; secret scan clean (one bug-check doc string + package-lock task-list-item substring both false positives); npm run build green (26 pages + worker dist 550KB); root npm audit 0 vulnerabilities; site npm audit 4 low / 6 moderate (no critical, no high) — WARN, pre-existing not from this batch. Verdict: PASS.

progress_table.label: npm run build — 26 pages + worker dist

key_decisions: Source-touching commit — ran the full applicable check suite (type-check, tests, build, anti-patterns, secrets, dep audit).
ESLint skipped because the repo has no eslint config; astro check and TS provide the linting signal.

Secret-scan grep matched two strings: (1) the literal regex inside bug-check/SKILL.md documenting private-key detection, (2) substring 'sk-' inside `task-list-item` in package-lock.json. Both verified false positives.
site npm audit reports 4 low + 6 moderate (no critical, no high). Not introduced by this batch; tracked as carried debt for a separate dependency-bump pass.
Walking-up REPO_ROOT bug fix verified: skill detail pages now render the Updated badge with real ISO timestamps.
user_preferences: User asked for full publish (commit + staging deploy + prod). Pause for explicit approval before prod deploy per CLAUDE.md flow.

next_actions: Proceed with the v1.2 feature commit (gate passed).
Stage deploy via npm run deploy:staging.
curl staging health, verify version SHA matches HEAD.
